privileged_info_summary: The task presents a synthetically-generated HTML file with three deliberate accessibility violations: (1) Image element with ID 'hero-banner' missing alt text, violating WCAG 2.1 SC 1.1.1; (2) Text element with ID 'footer-disclaimer' using light gray (#cccccc) on white background (#ffffff) producing approximately 1.53:1 contrast ratio, violating WCAG 2.1 SC 1.4.3 which requires 4.5:1 for Level AA compliance; (3) Email input field with ID 'newsletter-input' lacking associated label element or aria-label attribute, violating WCAG 2.1 SC 3.3.2. All expected issues and their element IDs are correctly specified in the task metadata.
